_readme: To add a JSON dataset: 1) place a .json file in datasets/, 2) register it in model/jsonLoaders.ts, 3) append an entry here with source.type json. For TypeScript datasets, add a loader in model/loaders.ts and set source.type module.

datasets.title: Users
datasets.description: Full user profiles with address, roles, and purchase history

datasets.title: Current User
datasets.description: Authenticated user session with profile and preferences

datasets.title: GitHub User
datasets.description: GitHub API user profile response shape

datasets.title: GitHub User Profile (JSON)
datasets.description: Real GitHub user API response loaded from JSON

datasets.title: GitHub Repository (JSON)
datasets.description: GitHub repository API response loaded from JSON

datasets.title: Todos
datasets.description: Simple todo items with completion status

datasets.title: Photos (Full)
datasets.description: Unsplash-style photo object with full metadata

datasets.title: Photos (Short)
datasets.description: Trimmed photo object for lightweight use cases

datasets.title: Video Player
datasets.description: Video player UI state and controls

datasets.title: Audio Player
datasets.description: Audio player UI state with track info

datasets.title: Radio Player
datasets.description: Radio stream player state and station info

datasets.title: Products
datasets.description: Paginated product catalog (DummyJSON-style API response)

datasets.title: Product Categories
datasets.description: E-commerce category list with slugs and URLs

datasets.title: Shopping Cart
datasets.description: Cart with items, tax, shipping, and totals

datasets.title: Countries
datasets.description: Country list with dial codes and flag emojis

datasets.title: Languages
datasets.description: ISO language codes for localization

datasets.title: Months
datasets.description: Full month names

datasets.title: Months (Short)

datasets.title: Weekdays (Short)
datasets.description: Abbreviated weekday names

datasets.title: Bank Accounts
datasets.description: Bank account records with balances and transactions

datasets.title: Marketing Dashboard

datasets.title: Carousel Settings

datasets.title: Dashboard Layout
datasets.description: Dashboard layout API response with sections
